overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European town at night. The character navigates narrow cobblestone streets, open squares, and a brick tunnel illuminated by warm torchlight and window glow against a dark blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow medieval street between tall stone buildings

entered.detail: tall stone building with dark facade and lit windows
stone building with wooden overhang and warm window light
ground lantern with flickering flame illuminating the path
wooden cart or wagon parked against the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow cobblestone street flanked by tall stone buildings with warm lit windows. The atmosphere is dark and moody, illuminated primarily by a distant torch lantern and window glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with wooden barricades

events.description: exits narrow street into wider town square with open space

agents.ego_description: walking through the open square toward a distant archway

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking near the far archway entrance

entered.detail: wide open plaza area with cobblestone ground
brick archway visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider town square with wooden barricades on the right. The character continues walking toward a distant brick archway, with stone buildings now further back on the sides and a sparse crowd visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area with grass patches approaching tunnel

events.description: ground surface changes from cobblestone to grass and dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking across grassy terrain toward the brick tunnel entrance

entered.detail: patchy grass and dirt ground replacing cobblestones
large brick archway entrance with warm lantern light
simple wooden fence along the right side

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions from cobblestone to grassy dirt as the character approaches a brick tunnel archway. Wooden fences line the path and the buildings recede into the background.

events.description: begins ascending stone stairs inside the tunnel

agents.ego_description: entering the tunnel and climbing the stone stairs within

entered.detail: enclosed brick tunnel with curved ceiling
rough brick wall of the tunnel
rough brick wall with mounted lantern

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow brick tunnel illuminated by wall-mounted lanterns. The space is enclosed with rough brick walls on both sides, and the path leads upward via stone stairs toward a distant exit light.

events.description: exits tunnel into narrow cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and continuing down the narrow street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera in the distance

entered.detail: half-timbered building with dark wooden beams
doorway with warm light spilling onto the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the character enters another narrow cobblestone street lined with timber-framed buildings. A lit doorway glows on the left, and a pedestrian is visible walking in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody medieval town that transitions from narrow, enclosed streets into an open square and finally toward a brick tunnel. It begins by following the character through a tight cobblestone alley flanked by tall stone buildings with warm, glowing windows. As the path widens, the scene opens into a town square where wooden barricades appear on the right and a sparse crowd becomes visible in the distance. The camera then continues forward as the cobblestones shift to grassy dirt, with the surrounding buildings receding into the background. Finally, the movement leads directly toward a brick archway and tunnel, guided by wooden fences lining the path.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic confines of a brick tunnel into the open air of a medieval street. It begins by following the character through an enclosed passage of rough brick walls, guided by the warm glow of wall-mounted lanterns. As the path leads upward via stone stairs, the camera moves toward a distant light at the tunnel's end. The scene then opens into a narrow cobblestone street lined with timber-framed buildings, where the lighting shifts from the tunnel's amber hue to the soft glow of a lit doorway and the deep blue of the night sky. Finally, the view expands to reveal a pedestrian walking in the distance ahead.
